title: mangifera cochinchinensis
intro: Mangifera cochinchinensis, also known as the Indian horse mango or the wild mango, is a deciduous tree native to Asia that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mangifera cochinchinensis include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and acting as a natural laxative. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, which can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
